modules.label: Requirement form status
modules.dryRunRule: May pass only when verified or explicitly accepted for dry-run

modules.label: File intake status
modules.dryRunRule: Required files must be verified or marked not required

modules.label: Plan Puzzle / SVG / quantity status
modules.dryRunRule: Only verified quantity facts may pass

modules.label: Quote Factory status
modules.dryRunRule: Validator and acceptance requirements must be satisfied

modules.label: Raw Candidate status
modules.dryRunRule: Candidate-only evidence is not pricing authority

modules.label: MethodSpec status
modules.dryRunRule: Must not be blocked by engine entry

modules.label: Output preview status
modules.dryRunRule: Preview must not become formal output
